_description: NH3 emission factors for livestock housing (confined animals), expressed as gN per livestock unit per day, converted to gN per head per day using standard liveweight assumptions. Primary source: T.H. Misselbrook et al. (2000) Ammonia emission factors for UK agriculture, Atmospheric Environment. DOI: 10.1016/S1352-2310(99)00350-7
_units_raw: gN per livestock unit (LU) per day, where 1 LU = 500 kg liveweight
_liveweight_source: Standard EU livestock liveweight assumptions consistent with Sutton et al. 1999 and IPCC 2006 Guidelines
_note: Sheep and goats are reported together in T.H. Misselbrook et al. (2000) at 3 gN/LU/day. Separate per-head values derived using the IPCC V4 2006 guidelines, tables 10A.2 and 10A.9

bovine.source_table: Sutton et al. 1999, housing stage, IPCC 2006 T10A-4

pigs.source_table: Sutton et al. 1999, housing stage, IPCC 2006 T10A-7

poultry.source_table: Sutton et al. 1999, housing stage IPCC 2006 T10A-9
poultry.note: Low per-head factor compensated by very high stocking densities in intensive operations

sheep.source_table: Sutton et al. 1999, sheep+goats IPCC 2006 T10A-9
